summary: QA pass: verify chunk boundaries for 2-3 texts per tradition
description:
## Goal

QA pass: manually verify chunk boundaries for 2-3 representative texts per tradition.

## Procedure

For each tradition in v1, pick 2-3 texts and:
1. Open the raw file alongside `corpus/{tradition}/{text_id}/chunks/`.
2. Spot-check at least 5 chunks per text:
   - Section label matches the source's native division
   - Chunk body starts and ends at sensible boundaries (no mid-sentence cuts)
   - `token_count` is plausible (200-800)
   - Citation metadata (tradition, text_name, section, translator) is correct

## Deliverable

Notes on any issues found (config errors, splitter bugs, source-quality problems). Promote serious issues to bug tickets blocking Stage 3.

## Acceptance Criteria

- 2-3 texts per tradition reviewed
- All issues documented
- Splitter / config bugs filed as their own tickets
